svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WkEotC8qMs8-3XUmEJiV"> <mxGraphModel dx="1147" dy="689" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam style strictuml

actor \"Customer\" as Cust
participant \"Web UI\" as Web
participant \"Python Backend\" as Engine
database \"Firestore DB\" as DB
actor \"Admin\" as Admin

== Step 1: Cake Customization ==
Cust -> Web: Choose design & add-ons
Web -> Engine: Send options & date
Engine -> DB: Check if date is available
DB --> Engine: Return status
Engine -> DB: Save order (Status: 'Pending')
DB --> Engine: Confirm save
Engine --> Web: Show \"Pending Approval\"
Web --> Cust: Show waiting screen
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="TbD95UQuUCrkSF7wets8-15"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="801.61" x="20" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
